Flat concept inventory:
- Accelerated Techniques | papers: 57e7af0b69325fafb371ef5d502e39ef9c90ef7e; a1f8082505c7e90b0a033e1b9da0a97d67aad66c; e30666ed82670463aa47686e744f0c6f2a0e083d; 532c2c7a247d9e97d20abec1b2f4612984fdab93; d8e9f8c8a37cb4cd26b92ad0d942d641cd512644; 1b5db3170c195508ff24fee8eda0d4987e806f0b; ba5261e729c181e28a98dee2c08d7cf5fc7127a2; 4067a6f57f708dec4459d3d4322373e06c2b168c; 43e624ddeed82df944a6cae0dedec3372438e243; 5e04881e91bff952d102d967c4ffb498ec30d4af; 218c5c69f3cf0c158e9b6af239a2cc62a688c6de; 56767c18bb5aaa2b6377624168bed1b6dcc4b94d; b7d12aec8a0152ec4921dfa43ab525a63b334385; f0c31511134abdd23f990310e8a2f2eb3a629b62; ea1f648988c632a6dbab6d8b88432456aa021cfb; 1c0a0ec50a639efe9569d0c57f73c8e1b47acbcd; a9caf21a845cb0b1b1d453c052188de118006093; f206d34afed6a5705757f96ea97c7bfb9e1a83cd; 1b4a7c0f1f46662078547388a1041aec907d9009; bc1c1b0c4214907e2fc872f54a8e66b327d6aa6b; d0deaec3e1f74701ac43600d9e64c5c969be7391; eb3415db1b322b1f7bf95f8697aed701b0d40f88; 26128d9ec47f044de6f0186f86c0c7fb3ccef77f; 26a67b61b29376aa05d5b6f2f3a6dc11d4594b22; 27b1b41ac386814af6f7bfd4646781f3f32b8a38; 564855d475ed9197dd7516594557ff886ff623e5; 89d3d19ad717cd534bdd1866d28e2da253147705; ce9435c82dc9b576f2037aa2f4357a520be9b2aa; eee108b3e51e89d160d1116935e062c4d169b475; 4a984ec8286b19bb0c033e6e4df198a0421b0c17; 2ef60a4ea4ea53056be811ff55679eb59fb4b586; d05141dc0900140f7146bb71e1f7402cf896ea87; d988eb48e8b4e471f5df9d081bfc32db0781e6bf; f4db96c6fe2fcd83b50d54d585cbc558704e3022; d6e21619df572d04b2b2d97b4c5d1fd604f185fb; 5efadc9019ce3378a0eb6c8f939cdde6c8918b1e; 15e81c8d1c21f9e928c72721ac46d458f3341454; 9d9c4a3b27dab2293ed915ad69662ea09901ccab; 1bebcbfb3b8309c9cea44de52662a911f99bc65b; 2d08ed53491053d84b6de89aedbf2178b9c8cf84; a1849a77644ff411a03833b5aa7a65ff57158c50; 9c5c89199114858eafbe50b46d77d38ffd03b28a; 75fe6c3ffdea2608794b4f21119c5a4dec07663a; 3d473cbb7a377cf960abff31748a1a39bb6c7d7c; 3556722b4703a21abafd2f9388743202943f4503; 3e8f037d1b2c893f4df37deda1da3dcc577a8bac; fe2f254923c72958fb65e025adf38ec6403dd6f8; 6a1c61a0da5f56a3fdfca5515767cfd74529524a; d8d0672e2cb73dcd25e6eee5fdf11aa1cbabecf0
- Speculative decoding | papers: 57e7af0b69325fafb371ef5d502e39ef9c90ef7e; a1f8082505c7e90b0a033e1b9da0a97d67aad66c; e30666ed82670463aa47686e744f0c6f2a0e083d; 532c2c7a247d9e97d20abec1b2f4612984fdab93; d8e9f8c8a37cb4cd26b92ad0d942d641cd512644; 1b5db3170c195508ff24fee8eda0d4987e806f0b; ba5261e729c181e28a98dee2c08d7cf5fc7127a2; 4067a6f57f708dec4459d3d4322373e06c2b168c; 43e624ddeed82df944a6cae0dedec3372438e243; 5e04881e91bff952d102d967c4ffb498ec30d4af; 218c5c69f3cf0c158e9b6af239a2cc62a688c6de; 56767c18bb5aaa2b6377624168bed1b6dcc4b94d; b7d12aec8a0152ec4921dfa43ab525a63b334385; f0c31511134abdd23f990310e8a2f2eb3a629b62; ea1f648988c632a6dbab6d8b88432456aa021cfb; 1c0a0ec50a639efe9569d0c57f73c8e1b47acbcd; a9caf21a845cb0b1b1d453c052188de118006093; f206d34afed6a5705757f96ea97c7bfb9e1a83cd; 1b4a7c0f1f46662078547388a1041aec907d9009; bc1c1b0c4214907e2fc872f54a8e66b327d6aa6b; d0deaec3e1f74701ac43600d9e64c5c969be7391; eb3415db1b322b1f7bf95f8697aed701b0d40f88; 26128d9ec47f044de6f0186f86c0c7fb3ccef77f; 26a67b61b29376aa05d5b6f2f3a6dc11d4594b22; 27b1b41ac386814af6f7bfd4646781f3f32b8a38
